name: md-wysiwyg
description: Typora-like WYSIWYG markdown editor and viewer for Pulsar

editorMaxWidth.title: Editor Max Width
editorMaxWidth.description: Maximum width of the editor content area in pixels

mermaidRenderDelay.title: Mermaid Render Delay
mermaidRenderDelay.description: Delay in milliseconds before rendering mermaid diagrams

fontSize.title: Font Size
fontSize.description: Custom font size in pixels. 0 means use theme default.

allowUnsafeRendering.title: Allow Unsafe Math and Mermaid Rendering
allowUnsafeRendering.description: Allow trusted KaTeX commands and Mermaid loose security mode for trusted local documents.
